assessmentQuestionVersion.name: OCCUPATIONAL MEDICINE INJURY EVALUATION
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText:
OCCUPATIONAL MEDICINE INJURY EVALUATION – INCLUDING:
  • Evaluation and management of back pain/acute strain
  • Evaluation and management of neck pain/strain
  • Evaluation and management of wrist pain/carpel tunnel syndrome
  • Understanding and adherence to state post injury guidelines
  • Completion of worker’s compensation post Injury Forms
  • Performance of fitness for duty examination
  • Determining work status post Injury/return to work guidelines
